# Aperture

class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
camera, photo, pictures, shutter, exposure

## Categories
photography

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/aperture)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Aperture;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Aperture { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
